name: What if my business info is wrong on some sites but right on my website?
description: Fix the source data first, then sync every directory. One wrong phone number or hour can confuse both customers and voice assistants.

mainEntity.name: What if my business info is wrong on some sites but right on my website?

acceptedAnswer.text: If someone says your listing details are wrong, treat that as a priority and correct the master record first. Then update every platform, because one outdated phone number or hour can cause assistants and customers to distrust the rest of your information.
acceptedAnswer.description: Fix the source data first, then sync every directory. One wrong phone number or hour can confuse both customers and voice assistants.
